none.justification: It correctly identifies the 14 `src/ap/ieee802_11.c` whole functions and essentially all 9 partial functions, but it explicitly excludes the Makefile-gated `src/common/sae.c` functions. That misses 35 whole functions, so the answer is badly incomplete versus the GT total of 49 whole + 9 partial.

ccodegraph.justification: Matches the GT: 35 Makefile-gated `src/common/sae.c` functions plus 14 `ieee802_11.c` whole functions, and all 9 partial functions across the expected files. It also correctly excludes non-function struct-field blocks and out-of-scope/non-gated SAE-named helpers.

codegraph.justification: It finds the in-file `#ifdef` cases and all 9 partial functions, but incorrectly refuses to count the build-gated `src/common/sae.c` functions. That omits the same 35 whole functions the GT calls out as essential, leaving the answer far short of the required 58 functions.

cbm.justification: The named function list appears to include the full GT set, including the 35 `src/common/sae.c` functions, 14 `ieee802_11.c` whole functions, and all 9 partial functions. However it reports the counts as 34/48/57 instead of the GT’s 35/49/58, so it is internally inconsistent and not fully correct on a scoring dimension the GT emphasizes.
